steps.title: Set up the percentage calculation
steps.content: We need to find what 7% of 300 equals. Using the percentage formula, we identify: percent = 7%, whole = 300 shrubs.

steps.title: Calculate the number of lilac shrubs
steps.content:
Number of lilac shrubs = $\frac{7}{100} \times 300$. Simplify:
$$\frac{7 \times 300}{100} = \frac{2100}{100} = 21$$
That matches Choice B — $21$.
